things.name: Avenue of the Baobabs (Morondava)
things.description: Madagascar's most iconic image - ancient baobab trees lining a dirt road at sunset

things.name: Rova of Antananarivo (Queen's Palace)
things.description: Royal palace complex on the highest hill overlooking the capital

things.name: Lemur Watching
things.description: Madagascar's unique lemurs - see ring-tailed, sifaka and aye-aye

things.name: Tsimbazaza Botanical and Zoological Park
things.description: Lemurs, fossas and chameleons in the city zoo with Madagascar natural history

things.name: Analakely Market
things.description: Antananarivo's largest and most colourful traditional market

things.name: Andringitra National Park Trekking
things.description: Dramatic granite peaks and lemur-filled forest in the southern highlands

things.name: Ranomafana National Park
things.description: Rare golden bamboo lemur and endangered greater bamboo lemur in rainforest

things.name: Artisan Centre (Ambatoroka)
things.description: Madagascar's unique raffia, silk and gemstone handicrafts

things.name: Tsingy de Bemaraha
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage razor-sharp limestone pinnacles - one of Earth's strangest landscapes

things.name: Romazava Meat and Greens Stew
things.description: Madagascar's national dish - mixed meat stew with moringa leaves and broth
